description: CompositionSheer white and purple tunic with floral print, made of 100% polyester, has three-quarter sleeves, shawl neck and polyester liningFitRegularWash careWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachDry inside out in shadeWarm ironThis tunic by jealous 21 is designed to accentuate your femininity with its floral print and classic cut. Pair it with leggings and heels for a formal look or wear it when hanging out with your friends by teaming it with denims and flats for a casual look.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 5'7" and chest 33"
